title: Build an expectation suite
description: Profile a dataset, derive schema/value/freshness expectations, and wire them as a gate with thresholds and quarantine.
body: Steps: 1. Profile the dataset to learn types, ranges, null rates, cardinality, and row-count bands. 2. Encode expectations: schema/types, value ranges, null thresholds, key uniqueness, and freshness. 3. Calibrate thresholds from history so they pass on normal data. 4. Wire the suite as a promotion gate, quarantining failures with the failing expectation recorded. 5. Seed a known-bad record and confirm it is caught. Rollback point: keep the prior suite version to revert. Validation: the suite passes on good data and blocks a seeded regression; a suite that has never failed on bad data has not been verified to work.
